meaning: adj.漂亮的；美丽的；美好的
example: The flowers in the garden are very beautiful.
translation: 花园里的花非常美丽。

meaning: v.打扫；使干净 adj.整洁的；洁净的 ；干净的
example: I clean my room every weekend.
translation: 我每个周末打扫我的房间。

meaning: adj.辛苦的，艰难的；坚硬的；困难的 ；费劲的 adv.努力地
example: We work hard to achieve our goals.
translation: 我们努力工作以实现我们的目标。

meaning: vt./vi.学，学习，学会
example: We learn new things every day at school.
translation: 我们每天在学校学习新东西。

meaning: phra.新南威尔士州
example: New South Wales is a state in Australia.
translation: 新南威尔士州是澳大利亚的一个州。

meaning: adv.很快，不久，即刻，⻢上;快
example: We will finish our homework soon.
translation: 我们很快就会完成作业。

meaning: phra.暑假
example: We go to the beach during summer holiday.
translation: 我们在暑假期间去海滩。

meaning: v.搭乘；乘坐（⻋/船/⻜机等）；带走 ；拿走；学习；上（课）；把带往；选 择要；选择购买；拿；带领；接受；花 费；做（某个动作）
example: I take the bus to school every day.
translation: 我每天乘公交车上学。

meaning: phrase.拍照片
example: We take photos of the beautiful scenery.
translation: 我们拍摄美丽风景的照片。

meaning: n.时间；时刻，时候；倍；次数；时期 v.计时；安排时间 adj.时间的；定时的 ；分期的
example: We have a good time playing together.
translation: 我们一起玩得很开心。

meaning: n.英国；联合王国（包括大不列颠及北 爱尔兰）
example: The UK is made up of four countries.
translation: 英国由四个国家组成。

meaning: n.伞；雨伞
example: I use an umbrella when it rains.
translation: 下雨时我使用雨伞。

meaning: adj.谁的；（特指）那个人的 pron.谁 的；（特指）那个人的
example: Whose book is this on the desk?
translation: 桌子上的这本书是谁的？

meaning: n.工作；著作，（音乐艺术）作品 v.（使）工作；（使）运转；操作；经 营；起作用
example: My parents work hard to support our family.
translation: 我的父母努力工作养家。

meaning: pron.两者，两者都 det./adj.两者的 ，两个；两个都 conj.不仅......而且 ......
example: Both my brother and I like playing football.
translation: 我和我哥哥都喜欢踢足球。

meaning: n.变化；改变；变革；零钱 v.变化；变 革；换乘；改变；使不同
example: The weather changes quickly in spring.
translation: 春天的天气变化很快。

meaning: phrase.进来
example: Please come in and have a seat.
translation: 请进来坐一下。

meaning: phrase.加油；快点；拜托；来吧；开 始
example: Come on, let's play basketball together.
translation: 来吧，让我们一起打篮球。

meaning: n.厨师 v.烹饪；煮；烧
example: My mom cooks delicious meals for our family.
translation: 我妈妈为我们家做美味的饭菜。

meaning: n.堂兄弟（或姐妹）；表兄弟（或姐妹 ）
example: My cousin lives in a different city.
translation: 我的表弟住在另一个城市。

meaning: n.医生；博士 v.篡改
example: The doctor helps sick people get better.
translation: 医生帮助病人康复。

meaning: n.司机；驾驶员
example: The bus driver drives us to school every day.
translation: 公交车司机每天开车送我们上学。

meaning: n.家庭；家族 adj.家庭的；家族的
example: My family likes to have dinner together.
translation: 我的家人喜欢一起吃晚餐。

meaning: adj.极好的，美妙的，了不起的，吸引 人的，有趣的，幻想的，奇异的，稀奇 古怪的，荒谬的
example: The movie we watched last night was fantastic.
translation: 我们昨晚看的电影非常棒。

meaning: n.农场主；农夫；农人；农⺠
example: The farmer grows vegetables in the field.
translation: 农民在田里种蔬菜。

meaning: n.(grandpa)(外)祖父；爷爷；外公 ；姥爷
example: My grandfather tells me interesting stories.
translation: 我的爷爷给我讲有趣的故事。

meaning: n.（外）祖母，奶奶，外婆
example: My grandmother bakes delicious cookies for me.
translation: 我的奶奶为我烤美味的饼干。

meaning: n.祖父；祖母；外祖父；外祖母
example: I visit my grandparents every weekend.
translation: 我每个周末去看望我的祖父母。

meaning: n.奶奶；外婆
example: Granny likes to knit sweaters for me.
translation: 奶奶喜欢为我织毛衣。

meaning: v.介绍；引⻅；引进；使初次了解；使 尝试
example: Let me introduce my new friend to you.
translation: 让我向你介绍我的新朋友。

meaning: 小红帽
example: Little Red Riding Hood is a famous fairy tale.
translation: 《小红帽》是一个著名的童话故事。

meaning: n.成员；分子；会员
example: I am a member of the school football team.
translation: 我是学校足球队的成员。

meaning: n.护士；保姆 v.护理；照料；喂奶
example: The nurse takes care of patients in the hospital.
translation: 护士在医院照顾病人。

meaning: n.（telephone）电话
example: I call my friend on the phone every day.
translation: 我每天打电话给我的朋友。

meaning: n.警方；警察部⻔ v.维持治安；管理 ；监督
example: The police help keep our community safe.
translation: 警察帮助保持我们社区的安全。

meaning: n.麻烦，困难，问题；难题
example: We work together to solve the problem.
translation: 我们一起解决这个问题。

meaning: n.（电影）⻆色；作用；职责；职能
example: I play the role of a doctor in the school play.
translation: 我在学校剧中扮演医生的角色。

meaning: phrase.逃跑；出走；逃避；跑开
example: The cat saw the dog and ran away.
translation: 猫看到狗就跑开了。

meaning: n.场景；现场；(戏剧或歌剧的)场；场 面
example: The scene in the movie was very exciting.
translation: 电影中的场景非常激动人心。

meaning: n.出租汽⻋；的士；计程⻋ v.乘坐出租 汽⻋
example: We take a taxi to the airport.
translation: 我们乘出租车去机场。

meaning: pron.这些；this的复数 adj.这些的
example: These books are very interesting.
translation: 这些书非常有趣。

meaning: phra.离开
example: He was angry and walked off without saying anything.
translation: 他很生气，什么也没说就走了。

meaning: n.树林；小树林，林地
example: We like to play in the woods near our house.
translation: 我们喜欢在房子附近的树林里玩。

meaning: n.词；字；单词；话语 v.用词语表达
example: I learn a new English word every day.
translation: 我每天学习一个新的英语单词。

meaning: n.工人；工作者；工人雇员；工蜂
example: The worker builds houses for people.
translation: 工人为人们建造房子。

meaning: adv.总是；一直
example: I always brush my teeth before going to bed.
translation: 我总是在睡觉前刷牙。

meaning: n.乐队；乐团；带子；一伙
example: The school band plays music at the concert.
translation: 学校乐队在音乐会上演奏音乐。

meaning: conj.因为
example: I like summer because I can swim every day.
translation: 我喜欢夏天，因为我可以每天游泳。

meaning: n.钟（声）；铃（声）；铃铛
example: The school bell rings at 8:00 in the morning.
translation: 学校的铃声在早上8点响起。

meaning: v.带到某处；带来(过去式为brought)
example: Please bring your textbook to class tomorrow.
translation: 请明天带你的课本到课堂。

meaning: adj.冷静的；凉爽的；顶好的；酷的 ，棒的，绝妙的 v.变冷；冷静下来
example: The weather is cool in autumn.
translation: 秋天的天气很凉爽。

meaning: adj.容易的；不费力的
example: This math problem is easy to solve.
translation: 这个数学问题很容易解决。

meaning: adv.到处；处处；各个地方；所有地方 pron.到处；处处；各个地方；所有地 方
example: You can see flowers everywhere in spring.
translation: 春天你到处都能看到花。

meaning: n.友谊，朋友关系；友情 n.友好关系
example: True friendship lasts forever.
translation: 真正的友谊天长地久。

meaning: v.受伤；（使）疼痛 n.伤痛 adj.受伤的
example: I hurt my knee when I fell down.
translation: 我摔倒时伤了膝盖。

meaning: vi./vt.评价；评判；判断 n.法官；审判 员；裁判员
example: We shouldn't judge people by their appearance.
translation: 我们不应该以貌取人。

meaning: n.运气；好运；幸运
example: Good luck on your exam!
translation: 祝你考试好运！

meaning: n.魔术；魔法；魔力 adj.有魔力的；神 奇的；魔术（似）的；有神奇力量的
example: The magician performed amazing magic tricks.
translation: 魔术师表演了令人惊叹的魔术。

meaning: n.吉祥物
example: The panda is the mascot of the zoo.
translation: 熊猫是动物园的吉祥物。

meaning: n.项链
example: My mom wears a beautiful necklace.
translation: 我妈妈戴着一条漂亮的项链。

meaning: adj.奥林匹克运动会的
example: The Olympic Games are held every four years.
translation: 奥运会每四年举行一次。

meaning: adj.普通的；平常的；一般的
example: We lead ordinary but happy lives.
translation: 我们过着平凡但幸福的生活。

meaning: adj.受大众喜爱的，受欢迎的；流行的 ;普遍的；（音乐艺术等）大众的，通俗 的
example: This song is very popular among students.
translation: 这首歌在学生中很受欢迎。

meaning: n.比赛，竞赛，速度竞赛；赛⻋；种族 ；赛跑；竞争 v.比赛；快速移动
example: We had a race to see who could run the fastest.
translation: 我们比赛看谁跑得最快。

meaning: v.回响；环绕；(电话)响铃；给......打 电话 n.（铃）响；环；环形物，圈形的 东西；戒指；铃声
example: The phone rings when someone calls.
translation: 有人打电话时电话会响。

meaning: n.壳，壳体；⻉壳；⻣架；炮弹 v.剥 ......的壳；去......的皮；炮轰；炮击
example: I collected many beautiful shells at the beach.
translation: 我在海滩上收集了许多美丽的贝壳。

meaning: adj.银的；银色的；银制的，银质的 n.银；银牌；银色；银器 v.镀银于；使 ......成银色
example: The moon looks silver in the night sky.
translation: 月亮在夜空中看起来是银色的。

meaning: phrase.软体玩具；布绒玩具
example: My little sister has many soft toys in her room.
translation: 我妹妹房间里有许多毛绒玩具。

meaning: v.测试；检测；试验；检验 n.测试,试 验,检验
example: We have a math test tomorrow.
translation: 我们明天有数学测试。

meaning: v.信任，信赖，相信 n.信任，信赖，相 信
example: I trust my best friend with my secrets.
translation: 我信任我最好的朋友保守我的秘密。

meaning: phrase.当心；提防
example: Watch out for cars when crossing the street.
translation: 过马路时要小心汽车。

meaning: auxv.将要，会；愿意 v.愿意；遗赠 n.意志；意愿；遗嘱
example: I will study hard to get good grades.
translation: 我会努力学习取得好成绩。

meaning: adj.有⻛的；刮⻛的，⻛大的；多⻛的 ；空谈的；吹牛的
example: It's windy today, so we can fly kites.
translation: 今天有风，所以我们可以放风筝。

meaning: adj.担忧的；焦虑的；发愁的 v.担心 ；担忧；worry的过去式和过去分词
example: I was worried about my friend's health.
translation: 我担心我朋友的健康。

meaning: n.腕带
example: I wear a wristband to support my favorite team.
translation: 我戴腕带支持我最喜欢的球队。

meaning: n.答案；答复，回答 v.答复，回答
example: Can you answer the teacher's question?
translation: 你能回答老师的问题吗？

meaning: n.运动员；田径运动员
example: The athlete trains hard every day.
translation: 运动员每天努力训练。

meaning: v.收集，采集；使集中；搜集
example: I collect stamps as a hobby.
translation: 我集邮作为爱好。

meaning: n.骑自行⻋者,自行⻋运动员
example: The cyclist rode his bike very fast.
translation: 骑自行车的人骑得很快。

meaning: v.发电子邮件 n.电子邮件
example: I send an email to my friend every week.
translation: 我每周给朋友发一封电子邮件。

meaning: n.末端；结束；结尾；终止；尽头；目 标 v.结束；终止
example: The movie has a happy end.
translation: 这部电影有一个幸福的结局。

meaning: v.出发，离去；试；努力；行走；去 ；走；开始；移动
example: We go to school from Monday to Friday.
translation: 我们从周一到周五上学。

meaning: n.（英）千米，公里
example: The park is two kilometres away from my home.
translation: 公园离我家有两公里远。

meaning: phrase.歌剧院
example: The Sydney Opera House is a famous building.
translation: 悉尼歌剧院是一座著名的建筑。

meaning: n.四分之一；一刻钟，十五分钟；季度 ；地区；方向 v.分成四等分
example: A quarter of an hour is fifteen minutes.
translation: 一刻钟是十五分钟。

meaning: v.说；讲；说话
example: Please say your name aloud.
translation: 请大声说出你的名字。

meaning: n.特色菜；特价；特派员；专⻋；特别 的物品 adj.特别的；特殊的
example: Today is a special day for our family.
translation: 今天对我们家来说是特别的一天。

meaning: n.斑，点；斑点；圆点；地点；场所 v.识别；发现；弄脏
example: I found a beautiful spot to picnic.
translation: 我找到了一个美丽的野餐地点。

meaning: n.邮票；印章；印记；跺脚 v.盖印；跺 脚
example: I put a stamp on the envelope.
translation: 我在信封上贴了邮票。

meaning: v.告诉；讲，讲述，叙述；说；辨别
example: My mom tells me bedtime stories every night.
translation: 我妈妈每晚给我讲睡前故事。

meaning: n.顶；顶部；表面；顶端 v.胜过；超过 ；居......之首 adj.最高的；极棒的
example: The cat climbed to the top of the tree.
translation: 猫爬到了树顶。

meaning: n.火⻋；列⻋；列；队 v.训练；培训 ；接受训练
example: We take the train to visit our grandparents.
translation: 我们乘火车去看望祖父母。

meaning: 您真挚的用于信函的结尾
example: Yours sincerely, Tom
translation: 你真诚的，汤姆

meaning: n.亲笔签名；亲笔稿 v.亲笔签名于；亲 笔书写
example: The famous actor signed his autograph for me.
translation: 著名演员为我签名。

meaning: n.连环画杂志；漫画杂志；喜剧演员 adj.滑稽的，使人发笑的
example: I like to read comic books in my free time.
translation: 我喜欢在空闲时间看漫画书。

meaning: v.(过去式过去分词found)找到；找回 ；发现
example: I can't find my keys anywhere.
translation: 我到处都找不到我的钥匙。

meaning: adj.离去的；已往的；死去的 v.走；去 ；go的过去分词
example: The leaves have gone with the wind.
translation: 树叶随风而去。

meaning: n.束发夹；发卡
example: My sister wears a pretty hairpin in her hair.
translation: 我妹妹头发上戴着一个漂亮的发夹。

meaning: 找，寻找，寻求
example: I'm looking for my lost book.
translation: 我在找我丢失的书。

meaning: n.喜鹊；喜欢收集（无价值物品）的人
example: The magpie has black and white feathers.
translation: 喜鹊有黑白相间的羽毛。

meaning: n.明信片,⻛景明信片
example: I sent a postcard to my friend from Paris.
translation: 我从巴黎给朋友寄了一张明信片。

meaning: adj.光亮的；闪耀的；锃亮的；有光泽 的
example: The stars look shiny in the night sky.
translation: 星星在夜空中看起来很闪亮。

meaning: n.贴纸；粘附物；胶粘物；不干胶标签 ；不屈不挠的人 v.给贴上标签价
example: I put stickers on my notebook.
translation: 我在笔记本上贴贴纸。

meaning: adj.奇特的；奇怪的；陌生的
example: I heard a strange noise in the night.
translation: 我在夜里听到了奇怪的声音。

meaning: n.小偷；贼；窃贼
example: The thief stole my wallet.
translation: 小偷偷了我的钱包。

meaning: adv.还；也，而且
example: I like apples, and I also like bananas.
translation: 我喜欢苹果，我也喜欢香蕉。

meaning: adj.出了毛病的；破损的；残缺的；弄 坏的 v.打破；打断；休息；break的过 去分词
example: My bike is broken, so I need to fix it.
translation: 我的自行车坏了，所以我需要修理它。

meaning: n.灌木丛；矮树
example: There are many flowers in the bush.
translation: 灌木丛中有许多花。

meaning: v.买；换取；收买；相信
example: My dad will buy me a new school bag.
translation: 我爸爸会给我买一个新书包。

meaning: n.糖；糖果
example: I like to eat candy on special occasions.
translation: 我喜欢在特殊场合吃糖果。

meaning: phrase.口香糖
example: Chewing gum helps keep my breath fresh.
translation: 嚼口香糖有助于保持口气清新。

meaning: n.花；花朵
example: The rose is a beautiful flower.
translation: 玫瑰是一种美丽的花。

meaning: n.花园，果园；园子 v.从事园艺
example: My mom grows vegetables in the garden.
translation: 我妈妈在花园里种蔬菜。

meaning: v.发生，出现，碰巧，凑巧
example: What happened to your arm?
translation: 你的胳膊怎么了？

meaning: v.把藏起来，隐藏；隐蔽；躲藏；隐瞒 n.兽皮
example: Let's play hide and seek in the park.
translation: 我们在公园里玩捉迷藏吧。

meaning: v.及格；通过（考试或检查）；结束 ；传递；给；递；路过；通过；（时间 ）流逝；超过 n.（考试）及格；通行证
example: Please pass the salt to me.
translation: 请把盐递给我。

meaning: v.采，摘；拾；捡；掘，凿，挑选 n.精 选，掘
example: I like to pick apples in the orchard.
translation: 我喜欢在果园里摘苹果。

meaning: n.梅子；李子；紫红色；⻘紫色；令人 垂涎的东西 adj.令人垂涎的；吸引人的
example: The plum tree has many ripe fruits.
translation: 李子树上有许多成熟的果实。

meaning: modalv.将要；将会
example: Shall we go to the park this weekend?
translation: 我们这个周末去公园好吗？

meaning: prep.到；直到 conj.到，到时；直到 ，直到为止 n.现金出纳机
example: We will wait till the rain stops.
translation: 我们会等到雨停。

meaning: v.(for)等，等待,等候 n.等待,等待时间 ；等候
example: Please wait for me at the bus stop.
translation: 请在公交车站等我。

meaning: n.周末
example: We like to go hiking on the weekend.
translation: 我们喜欢在周末去远足。

meaning: adv.好吧；没问题 adj.好的
example: Everything is going to be alright.
translation: 一切都会好起来的。

meaning: adv.到处；向各处；在附近；环绕；大 约 prep.在......周围；环绕；围绕
example: There are many trees around our school.
translation: 我们学校周围有许多树。

meaning: n.动画片，卡通片 n.漫画
example: I watch cartoons on TV every evening.
translation: 我每天晚上在电视上看动画片。

meaning: n.城堡；堡垒
example: The castle on the hill looks very old.
translation: 山上的城堡看起来很古老。

meaning: adj.向下的；沮丧的；情绪低落的；悲 哀的 adv.向下 prep.沿......向下
example: The cat climbed down from the tree.
translation: 猫从树上爬下来。

meaning: v.做梦;梦想；梦⻅ n.梦;梦想，愿望 ，理想;梦寐以求的事
example: I had a nice dream last night.
translation: 我昨晚做了一个好梦。

meaning: n.灰尘；尘土；粉尘；尘埃；沙土 v.擦 灰；掸去；擦去......的灰尘
example: There is a lot of dust on the shelf.
translation: 架子上有很多灰尘。

meaning: abbr.数字化视频光盘 ；digitalvideodisc的缩写
example: We watched a DVD movie at home.
translation: 我们在家看了一部DVD电影。

meaning: phra.熟睡的，酣睡的
example: The baby is fast asleep in the crib.
translation: 婴儿在婴儿床里睡得很香。

meaning: n.电影；胶卷；底片；薄薄的一层 v.拍 摄电影
example: We went to see a film at the cinema.
translation: 我们去电影院看电影。

meaning: adj.滑稽的；好笑的；奇怪的；有趣的
example: The clown told funny jokes to make us laugh.
translation: 小丑讲有趣的笑话让我们笑。

meaning: 快点
example: Hurry up, or we will be late for school.
translation: 快点，否则我们上学要迟到了。

meaning: phrase.再多一会儿；稍等片刻
example: Wait just a minute, I'll be right back.
translation: 等一下，我马上回来。

meaning: n.钥匙；关键；键 adj.至关重要的；必 不可少的；关键的；主要的
example: I lost the key to my room.
translation: 我丢失了房间的钥匙。

meaning: adj.小的，年幼的；可爱的，可怜的 ，讨厌的
example: The little girl is playing with her doll.
translation: 小女孩正在玩她的洋娃娃。

meaning: n.锁 v.锁上，被锁住
example: Please lock the door when you leave.
translation: 离开时请锁门。

meaning: v.开；打开；开放 adj.开放的；营业的 n.公开；戶外
example: Can you open the window for me?
translation: 你能帮我打开窗户吗？

meaning: n.道路；小路，小径；成功的途径
example: We walked along the path in the park.
translation: 我们沿着公园的小路散步。

meaning: n.水池，池塘
example: There are many ducks in the pond.
translation: 池塘里有许多鸭子。

meaning: n.王子；(小附属国)君主，诸侯
example: The prince saved the princess from the dragon.
translation: 王子从龙手中救出了公主。

meaning: adv.快速地；迅速地，很快地
example: We need to finish our homework quickly.
translation: 我们需要快速完成作业。

meaning: phrase.现在；立刻
example: I need to go to the bathroom right now.
translation: 我现在需要去洗手间。

meaning: adv.在某个时候
example: Sometimes I go swimming with my friends.
translation: 有时我和朋友一起去游泳。

meaning: v.（用某种语言）讲，说；说话;交谈; n.说话;交谈
example: We like to talk about our favorite movies.
translation: 我们喜欢谈论我们最喜欢的电影。

meaning: v.旅游；旅行 n.旅游；旅行
example: I want to travel around the world someday.
translation: 我希望有一天能环游世界。

meaning: n.动物园
example: We visited the zoo and saw many animals.
translation: 我们参观了动物园，看到了许多动物。

meaning: n.睡觉，睡眠 v.睡觉；入睡
example: I need to sleep early tonight.
translation: 我今晚需要早睡。
